items.caption: Two cartoon characters are standing in front of a wooden table with a grid of icons representing different smart watches or wearables. each character is holding a sign with the name of a smart watch: "dumb watch," "smart watch," "honors watch." the character on the left is holding a sign that reads "dumb watch," while the character on the right is holding a sign that reads "smart watch." the background is plain and does not contain any additional details. a humorous take on the decision-making process for choosing a smart watch or wearable.
